expectations.text: Uses the Python MCP SDK (mcp or fastmcp)
Defines both list_invoices and create_invoice tools with proper schemas
create_invoice accepts client_name, amount, and description parameters
expectations.evidence: All three parameters in function signature

expectations.text: Uses a JSON file for data persistence (not an in-memory dict alone)
expectations.evidence: Uses in-memory list 'invoices = []'. No JSON file persistence.
Mentions pip install but no Claude configuration instructions
